name: Multi-Turn Identity Confusion
summary: Over extended multi-turn conversations, agents lose coherent identity boundaries. System prompts degrade, role constraints weaken, and the agent begins responding as a generic assistant rather than its assigned persona.
mechanism: Extended interaction causes the system prompt to recede in attention weight relative to accumulating conversation context. The agent's behaviour gradually defaults to base model tendencies. [Available in NAIL SDK]
blast_radius: Custom safety personas disabled through conversation length. Role-specific constraints bypassed without explicit attack.
prerequisite: Agent with system prompt-based persona or role constraints in multi-turn conversations.
mitre_mapping: ATLAS-NOVEL: Multi-Turn Identity Confusion (role loss across turns)
